name: Panzanella with red wine vinaigrette
intro: Good-quality bread is a joy, and even when it is a bit stale, it can be used in this delectable Italian salad. The vinaigrette moistens and refreshes the bread, making it the perfect partner for fresh, juicy tomatoes.

ingredients.item: unsliced stale dense-textured bread, such as ciabatta or sourdough, roughly torn into bite-sized pieces
5oz (600g) mixed tomatoes, roughly chopped into bite-sized chunks
salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Place the bread, tomatoes, onion, garlic, and capers in a large serving bowl. Season well and stir to combine.
Place the dressing ingredients in a small bowl, season, and stir well. Pour over the bread and tomato mixture and stir to coat.
Set aside for at least 10 minutes, or up to 2 hours, at room temperature, to allow the flavors to mingle. Stir the basil leaves into the salad just before serving.
